short_name: Pv-aCO₂ Gap-Guided Resuscitation in Adult Polytrauma Patients: A Prospective Randomized Controlled Trial
title: Pv-aCO₂ Gap-Guided Resuscitation in Adult Polytrauma Patients: A Prospective Randomized Controlled Trial

skipped_criteria: Poly-trauma patients (multiple injuries): no multi-injury or ISS field exists in the schema to verify polytrauma definition.

Shock States (inclusion): no blood pressure threshold or shock classification field captures this criterion precisely; sbp_mmhg could partially proxy but the criterion is broader than a single vital sign.
Any Chest trauma (exclusion): no chest-injury or body-region field exists in the schema.
Patients with obstructive and restrictive lung disease (exclusion): no prior pulmonary history field exists in the schema.
Obstructive sleep apnea (exclusion): no prior medical history field exists in the schema.
Septic shock (exclusion): no infection or sepsis classification field exists in the schema.
Patients who will require readmission within 48 h after step-down from the ICU (exclusion): requires prospective/temporal outcome data not available at enrollment.
Patients who will need extra-corporeal membrane oxygenation support (exclusion): no ECMO requirement field exists in the schema.
